config.script:
dim g_strNIP: g_strNIP = ""
'---------------------- 'otwórz/zamknij stronę '---------------------- function fopen() fopen=true end function
function fback() page_.result = vbCancel page_.goback() fback = true end function
'---------------------- 'naciśnięcie na klawisz '---------------------- sub page_click(byref pHli) page_.result=pHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) page_.goback end sub
'------------------- 'buduj potwierdzenie '------------------- function buildFormAdd(byref strNIP)
buildFormAdd = page_.domodalauto()
if buildFormAdd = 1 then strNIP = g_strNIP end if
end function
function PageIsValid(): PageIsValid = false PageIsValid = Len(Trim(g_strNIP)) > 0 end function
function c##CTRLID_NIP##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_strNIP c##CTRLID_NIP##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_NIP##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) g_strNIP = newValue c##CTRLID_NIP##_ondataentered = true end function
function on_ok() if not PageIsValid() then trans_.message 7000, 0, "Musisz podać jakieś kryterium." exit function end if page_.result = vbOK page_.goback end function
function on_cancel() page_.result = 0 page_.goback end function
